title: Add .msg as viewable file type in Files Column
excerpt:
Would be very helpful to be able to view email messages saved as files in the File Column [or Updates].  Right now, you have to download, then find it on your drive.

posts.author: curtfelch1 (Curtis Felch)
posts.cookedHtml:
Would be very helpful to be able to view email messages saved as files in the File Column [or Updates]. Right now, you have to download, then find it on your drive.

This would allow users to rely more on Mondays, and less on email.

Even having it able to fetch Outlook to open it [by file type] would be a decent alternative.
